narrative.description: Minishoot' Adventures is a 2D top-down action game blending bullet hell shooting, Metroidvania exploration, and Zelda-like dungeon progression. Players pilot a hovercraft through a handcrafted world of dungeons, enemies, and secrets.
narrative.core_loop: Explore an interconnected world, complete dungeons to gain abilities, fight bullet-pattern enemies and bosses, and backtrack to reach previously gated areas.

mechanics.map_notes: Core Metroidvania loop; new abilities open prior areas.
mechanics.expression: Core Metroidvania loop; new abilities open prior areas.

mechanics.map_notes: Spatial gates require specific upgrades to pass.
mechanics.expression: Spatial gates require specific upgrades to pass.

mechanics.map_notes: Independent aim from movement; core shooter identity.
mechanics.expression: Independent aim from movement; core shooter identity.

mechanics.map_notes: Bullet hell formations define combat challenge.
mechanics.expression: Bullet hell formations define combat challenge.

mechanics.map_notes: Zelda-like dungeon structure pacing world unlocks.
mechanics.expression: Zelda-like dungeon structure pacing world unlocks.

mechanics.map_notes: Dungeon and area bosses unlock subsequent content.
mechanics.expression: Dungeon and area bosses unlock subsequent content.

mechanics.map_notes: Health depletes on hits; death resets to checkpoint.
mechanics.expression: Health depletes on hits; death resets to checkpoint.

mechanics.map_notes: Dash/dodge for evading dense projectile patterns.
mechanics.expression: Dash/dodge for evading dense projectile patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Rooms lock during combat until cleared.
mechanics.expression: Rooms lock during combat until cleared.

mechanics.map_notes: Environmental damage zones in exploration spaces.
mechanics.expression: Environmental damage zones in exploration spaces.

mechanics.map_notes: Switches and triggers open paths and solve puzzles.
mechanics.expression: Switches and triggers open paths and solve puzzles.

mechanics.map_notes: Upgrades found through world exploration, not only bosses.
mechanics.expression: Upgrades found through world exploration, not only bosses.

mechanics.map_notes: Collectibles fill meters that unlock skill points.
mechanics.expression: Collectibles fill meters that unlock skill points.

mechanics.map_notes: Responsive top-down movement for dodging patterns.
mechanics.expression: Responsive top-down movement for dodging patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Primary fire executes immediately on input.
mechanics.expression: Primary fire executes immediately on input.

mechanics.map_notes: Pickups for health and resources scattered in the world.
mechanics.expression: Pickups for health and resources scattered in the world.

mechanics.map_notes: Optional overworld enemies for XP and drops.
mechanics.expression: Optional overworld enemies for XP and drops.

mechanics.map_notes: Permanent upgrades persist across the campaign.
mechanics.expression: Permanent upgrades persist across the campaign.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses shift patterns across health phases.
mechanics.expression: Bosses shift patterns across health phases.

mechanics.map_notes: Hidden rooms and optional paths off main routes.
mechanics.expression: Hidden rooms and optional paths off main routes.

mechanics.map_notes: Emergency radial burst to clear nearby projectiles.
mechanics.expression: Emergency radial burst to clear nearby projectiles.

mechanics.map_notes: Learnable boss attack sequences.
mechanics.expression: Learnable boss attack sequences.

mechanics.map_notes: Currency spent at vendors for permanent upgrades.
mechanics.expression: Currency spent at vendors for permanent upgrades.

mechanics.map_notes: Secondary weapons or abilities consume resources.
mechanics.expression: Secondary weapons or abilities consume resources.

mechanics.map_notes: Visual cues before enemy and boss attacks.
mechanics.expression: Visual cues before enemy and boss attacks.

mechanics.map_notes: Main gun fires without ammo depletion.
mechanics.expression: Main gun fires without ammo depletion.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Minishoot' Adventures through its core top-down shooter loop.
